description: Overview MSI MEG Z890 GODLIKE – The Ultimate Flagship Motherboard for Uncompromising Performance The MSI MEG Z890 GODLIKE is engineered for those who demand absolute dominance in performance, aesthetics, and innovation. description: Overview MSI MAG B860 TOMAHAWK WIFI The MSI MAG B860 TOMAHAWK WIFI stands as a perfect fusion of raw power, reliability, and advanced technology, engineered to meet the demands of gamers and creators alike. Built for the Intel® Core™ Ultra Processors (Series 2) with the LGA 1851 socket, this motherboard ensures top-tier compatibility and performance for next-generation computing. Designed to handle extreme workloads and gaming sessions, it supports DDR5 memory with speeds up to 9200+ MT/s (OC), offering unmatched responsiveness and smooth multitasking. The 12+1+1+1 Duet Rail Power System with 60A SPS, dual 8-pin CPU connectors, and MSI’s renowned Core Boost and Memory Boost technologies guarantee stable, precise power delivery for peak performance. Its 6-layer PCB made from 2oz thickened copper and server-grade materials enhances durability and system stability even under heavy load. The Frozr Guard thermal solution ensures efficient heat management through an extended heatsink design, MOSFET thermal pads rated at 7W/mK, additional choke thermal pads, and EZ M.2 Shield Frozr II, maintaining consistent cooling during long gaming marathons or intensive workloads. For effortless assembly and upgrades, MSI includes EZ PCIe Release, EZ M.2 Shield Frozr II, EZ M.2 Clip II, and EZ Antenna, making setup smoother than ever. On the performance side, the PCIe 5.0 slot and Lightning Gen 5 x4 M.2 deliver blazing-fast data transfer rates for next-generation GPUs and NVMe SSDs, ensuring lightning-speed responsiveness. Connectivity reaches new heights with Thunderbolt™ 4, Intel® Killer™ 5G LAN, and Intel® Killer™ Wi-Fi 7, offering ultra-low latency, stable connections, and cutting-edge bandwidth for professional workflows, online gaming, and high-speed content creation. Completing the experience, Audio Boost technology provides immersive, studio-grade sound, enhancing every gaming session and multimedia moment with crystal clarity. The MSI MAG B860 TOMAHAWK WIFI embodies performance, stability, and innovation — a true powerhouse for those who demand uncompromised speed, connectivity, and reliability in their gaming or productivity setup.

The board supports dual-channel DDR5 memory up to 8800+ MT/s (OC), ensuring rapid data throughput, enhanced multitasking, and superior overall system speed. For sustained power delivery, it features MSI’s robust 12+1+1+1 Duet Rail Power System, built with premium P-PAK components and backed by 8+4-pin CPU power connectors, Core Boost, and Memory Boost. Combined with a 6-layer server-grade PCB, it ensures stable performance, excellent heat tolerance, and strong signal integrity—ideal for long working hours and demanding applications. Thermals are handled efficiently with Frozr Guard, using 7W/mK MOSFET thermal pads and additional choke thermal pads to keep temperatures controlled even during heavy processing or high-speed operations. Upgraders will appreciate EZ PCIe Clip II, which allows effortless one-finger GPU removal, especially useful in tight micro-ATX cases. Storage and expansion performance is future-ready with a PCIe 5.0 slot and Lightning Gen 5 x4 M.2, delivering ultra-fast bandwidth for modern SSDs and next-gen graphics cards. For networking, the board includes 5G LAN paired with Wi-Fi 6E, offering stable, high-speed connectivity suitable for professional workloads, cloud-based editing, and uninterrupted streaming. The addition of Thunderbolt™ 4 further enhances productivity with true 40 Gb/s transfer speeds, support for 8K displays, daisy-chaining, and multi-port workflows—making it ideal for creators using docking stations, external storage, or high-res monitors. Rounding out the experience, Audio Boost ensures clean, detailed, studio-grade sound for immersive entertainment or professional audio tasks.
